description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a prominent rear wing for added downforce. The body is finished in a glossy yellow color with black accents on the lower panels, wheels, and rear diffuser. The car features a sharply contoured hood with aggressive air vents, large side air intakes, and a streamlined roofline that tapers towards the rear. The windows are tinted black, and the wheels are large and solid, suggesting a focus on speed and handling. The rear of the car is equipped with a pronounced diffuser and dual exhaust outlets, emphasizing its racing pedigree. The overall design is reminiscent of modern hypercars, blending advanced aerodynamics with striking visual appeal.
description: A glossy yellow and black sports car with a low, aerodynamic body, large rear wing, and aggressive styling details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply contoured hood, aggressive air vents, and wide stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the streamlined profile, large side air intake, and prominent rear wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the pronounced diffuser, dual exhausts, and the full width of the rear wing.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic lines and side intake.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual angular headlights with aggressive, swept-back shape and integrated LED strips
